---
title: Quick start
---

To gain access to iThenticate you can contact your [Key User](/tools/ithenticate/key-users.qmd) of your faculty. Your faculty's Key user can request an account for you. 

Once an [account](/tools/ithenticate/cost_access.qmd) has been created for you, you will receive an email from Turnitin. You can then [log in](/tools/ithenticate/log_in.qmd) and perform [your first scan](/tools/ithenticate/first_scan.qmd). 

iThenticate allows you to [save, share and export](/tools/ithenticate/exporting_results.qmd) your results. These results can be discussed and [interpreted](/tools/ithenticate/similarity_scores.qmd) together with your supervisor. 

You can also adjust your similarity check settings or run a [doc-to-doc](/tools/ithenticate/doc_to_doc_comparison.qmd) comparison. These options can be found in the Advanced Settings section under Documentation.
